pageDescription: Manage system configuration, preferences, appearance, and account security in one place.
providerGroupDescription: Manage the active provider and retrieval path.
systemGroupDescription: Manage model routing, system prompts, and instance-level connection checks.
providerCategoryDescription: Choose the provider first, then adjust the model and timeout.
statusSummaryDescription: Only the active path and index status.
preferenceGroupDescription: Language and theme apply immediately and stay separate from provider save logic.
preferencesCardDescription: Language and theme apply immediately in the current workspace.
languageSettingDescription: Change display language without affecting models or indexing.
themeSettingDescription: Theme preference is saved to your current account.
securityGroupDescription: Manage password security for the current account.
securityCardDescription: A new password takes effect on the next sign-in.
managementSectionDescription: Manage workspace members and permission boundaries.
managementCardDescription: User management stays in a dedicated page so settings do not turn into a large table.
managementGroupDescription: Admins can manage users and roles in the dedicated page.
providerSectionDescription: Separate chat routing, retrieval routing, and provider details so the active path and pending path stay clear.
providerSelectionHint: Switching providers changes the draft used by both save and connection tests.
primaryProviderHint: The primary provider controls the default chat path. Retrieval follows it unless you enable an override.
chatConfigSectionDescription: This decides which chat path is used immediately after save.
retrievalConfigSectionDescription: This decides which embedding profile the next retrieval index build will use.
advancedSettingsDescription: Open this only for an independent retrieval path or standby templates.
retrievalOverrideDescription: By default, retrieval follows the primary provider. Enable this only when retrieval needs a separate provider.
templateEditorDescription: Maintain connection settings for non-primary providers in advance so later switching is easier.
openAiBaseUrlHint: Supports official and proxy endpoints that follow the OpenAI API. If you enter only the root URL, the system will append /v1 automatically.
claudeBaseUrlHint: Claude uses the Anthropic Messages API by default. If you provide only the root URL, the system will append /v1/messages automatically.
voyageBaseUrlHint: Voyage is used for the Claude embedding path. If you provide only the root URL, the system will append /v1/embeddings automatically.
voyageEmbeddingHint: Claude retrieval uses Voyage embeddings. Related changes go through the background rebuild flow.
visionModelHint: Connection tests include a Vision model check for the current draft.
systemPromptPlaceholder: Enter the system prompt. Save an empty value to stop sending the default prompt.
systemPromptHint: If you clear and save it, future chats will not silently restore the default prompt.
modelSectionDescription: Keep these fields explicit so provider and indexing issues stay easy to diagnose later.
providerProfileSectionDescription: Edit each provider's connection settings and model fields.
providerProfileSelectionHint: Select a provider above to edit its saved configuration details.
providerTimeoutSectionDescription: This controls request timeouts for connection tests and runtime calls. Increase it only for slower models or longer proxy paths.
providerTimeoutHint: In seconds. Must be an integer greater than 0.
connectionHint: Run a quick connection test first, then save. Retrieval changes will rebuild indexes automatically in the background.
saveSectionDescription: Save now; retrieval changes rebuild the index in the background.
saveHint: Save now; retrieval changes rebuild the index in the background.
backgroundRebuildStartedNotice: Background retrieval index update has started. Queries will keep using the current index until the new one is ready.
backgroundRebuildRunningNotice: The retrieval index is still updating in the background. Queries will keep using the current index until the switch completes.
backgroundRebuildFailedNotice: The last background update failed. Queries are still using the current index.
providerTestOpenAiInvalidApiKey: The OpenAI-compatible endpoint responded, but the API key was rejected or is invalid. Check the OpenAI API key and the gateway's authentication requirements.
providerTestOpenAiModelNotAvailable: The OpenAI-compatible endpoint responded, but the model list does not include {{model}}. Confirm that the model is available on the gateway or that the model name is correct.
providerTestOllamaBaseUrlUnreachable: The Ollama Base URL ({{baseUrl}}) is unreachable or returned 502. If the API is running directly on your machine, switch to http://localhost:11434. If the API is running in Docker, confirm that host.docker.internal:11434 or host-gateway is reachable.
providerTestOllamaChatEndpointMissing: The target address is reachable, but it does not expose the Ollama chat endpoint /api/chat. Confirm that this is an Ollama service URL. If you are using an OpenAI-compatible endpoint, switch to the OpenAI provider.
providerTestOllamaConnectError: Unable to reach the Ollama service. Confirm that it is running and that the Ollama Base URL is correct.
providerTestOllamaHealthCheckFailed: Ollama connection test failed. Check the service status and configuration.
providerTestOllamaHttpError: The Ollama service request failed. Check the base URL, model name, and service status.
providerTestOllamaRequestError: The request to the Ollama service failed. Check network connectivity and the Ollama Base URL.
providerTestOllamaTagsEndpointMissing: The target address is reachable, but it does not expose the Ollama discovery endpoint /api/tags. Confirm that this is an Ollama service URL.
providerTestOllamaTimeout: The request to the Ollama service timed out. Confirm that the service is responsive or increase the timeout.
providerTimeoutInvalidSuffix: must be an integer greater than 0.
retrievalEmbeddingModelRequiredError: Embedding Model is required when retrieval override is enabled.
providerTimeoutInvalidError: Provider Timeout (Seconds) must be an integer greater than 0.
providerRequiredFieldsError: The active provider is missing required fields: {{fields}}.
retrievalRequiredFieldsError: The retrieval configuration is missing required fields: {{fields}}.
chatConnectionCardDescription: The provider and model used by chat requests right now.
retrievalCardDescription: The active retrieval profile and any pending profile still waiting to be promoted.
indexStatusCardDescription: The active generation, background build generation, and current rebuild state.
indexStatusIdleHint: Queries are using the current index. No background rebuild is running.
indexStatusRunningHint: A new index is building in the background. Queries keep using the current index until the switch finishes.
indexStatusFailedHint: The last background update failed. Queries are still using the current index.
